system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Light Melee against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 6

You unfurl ribbons or strands of cloth, causing them to harden at a precise moment to slice through foes. You can unleash a flurry of strands that lash out at everyone in a 20-foot radius per Rank of Waijia. Roll Light Melee against Parry scores of all inside the affected area. How it affects people is based on the targets’ Ranks in Qi: TARGET’S RANK EFFECT 0-1 Target is decapitated and killed 2 Target loses a limb (take Flaw) and suffers 4 Wounds 3 Target suffers 4 Wounds 4 Target suffers 2 Wounds 5 Target suffers 1 Wound 6+ Target takes 3d10 Damage This ability can only be used Cathartically. This can only be used safely by castrated males and is contained in the Merciless Willow manual. Non-castrated males and women can both learn the Technique and attempt to use it, but doing so incurs 7 Wounds and reduces Hardiness by one permanently (every time you use it).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticTargetEffects: Resolve effect by target Qi table: possible death, limb loss, direct Wounds, or 3d10 Damage
system.accessNotes: This can only be used safely by castrated males and is contained in the Merciless Willow manual.
system.requirementNotes: This can only be used safely by castrated males and is contained in the Merciless Willow manual. Can only be used Cathartically.
